content.text:
Looking at the image, the track appears as a wide green surface with a dark wall on the left — the car is still near the outer boundary of a right-hand curve, off the racing line but not crashed.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 79, target = 79 + 5 = 84
- Waypoint 84: x=6.0793, y=2.7734
- Car position: x=1.5579, y=5.0455
- Bearing = atan2(2.7734 - 5.0455, 6.0793 - 1.5579) = atan2(-2.2721, 4.5214)
- = atan2(-2.2721, 4.5214) ≈ -26.7°
- Current heading: 133.14°
- Delta = -26.7 - 133.14 = -159.84° → normalized: -159.84°

Still severely misaligned — heading ~133° (northwest) while track goes east. Maximum right steering required.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Car is off-track with heading 133° while target waypoint is at bearing -27°, requiring continued maximum right steering to realign with the eastward track direction.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track curves sharply after waypoint ~76 — sustained right steering needed to recover",
    "Car has been off-track for many steps, drifting to outer edge of right curve",
    "Car heading decreasing slowly: 169→152→144→137→133 — right turn is working but slow",
    "Must maintain maximum right steering (-25) at low speed (0.75) until heading drops below ~0°",
    "Car is right of center (is_left_of_center=false) — on outside of right-hand curve",
    "distance_from_center=0.576 with track_width=0.762 — very close to edge, recovery critical",
    "Visual shows dark wall on left — car near outer boundary, need to steer hard right",
    "Heading needs to drop to ~-27° (east-southeast) to realign with track direction",
    "Progress at 66.67% — car making forward progress despite being off-line",
    "all_wheels_on_track=false but is_offtrack=false — car is partially off but not reset"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [1.636, 1.602, 1.578, 1.578, 1.558],
    "y": [4.906, 4.957, 5.001, 5.001, 5.045],
    "yaw": [144.399, 139.971, 136.553, 136.553, 133.138]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -159.84,
  "speed": 0.75,
  "steering_angle": -25.0
}
```
